translations.en: To the debtor when his debt is settled

text.arabic:
بارَكَ اللهُ لَكَ في أَهْلِكَ وَمالِك،
إِنَّما جَـزاءُ السَّلَفِ الْحَمْدُ والأَداء
text.transliteration:
Bārakallāhu laka fī ahlika wa mālik,
innamā jazā'us-salafi ‘l-ḥamdu wa‘l-adā'.

translations.en:
May Allah bless you in your family and your wealth,
surely the reward for a loan is praise and returning (what was borrowed).

items.reference:
An-Nasa'i, 'Amalul-Yawm wal-Laylahp. 300, Ibn Majah 2/809. See also
Al-Albani, Sahih Ibn Majah2/55.
